vocab.example: The most stimulating part of my major is the innovative pedagogical approach that prioritizes student-led seminars over traditional lectures.

vocab.meaning: sự kích thích về mặt trí tuệ
vocab.example: I thrive on the intellectual stimulation I get from debating ethics with my professors and peers.

vocab.meaning: sự cộng hưởng/kết hợp đa ngành
vocab.example: What I find truly fascinating is the interdisciplinary synergy between psychology and computer science in my current research.

vocab.meaning: phân tích dựa trên thực nghiệm
vocab.example: Conducting empirical analysis on market trends has provided me with a grounded understanding of global economics.

vocab.meaning: khai quật/tìm ra những hiểu biết sâu sắc
vocab.example: Our field trips allow us to unearth insights into ancient civilizations that you simply cannot get from a textbook.

vocab.meaning: sự rõ ràng về mặt khái niệm/tư duy
vocab.example: Gaining conceptual clarity on complex legal principles has been the most rewarding milestone in my academic career so far.

vocab.meaning: những góc nhìn đa văn hóa
vocab.example: Studying international relations is captivating because it exposes me to various cross-cultural perspectives on global security.

vocab.meaning: hệ thống phương pháp luận khắt khe
vocab.example: I appreciate the rigorous methodology we use in the lab, as it ensures the integrity and accuracy of our scientific findings.

vocab.meaning: thu hẹp khoảng cách (giữa lý thuyết và thực tế)
vocab.example: The most interesting project I've done involved finding ways to bridge the gap between abstract physics and everyday engineering.

vocab.meaning: sự hiểu biết toàn diện/tổng thể
vocab.example: My studies have given me a holistic understanding of environmental issues, looking at both biological and political factors.
